required_confirmation: Whether A, B, and C each have separate appointmentDayId ranges.

overlap_check_policy.resource_level: Classes may overlap only when they use different confirmed internal resources and different instructor time.
overlap_check_policy.instructor_level: The same instructor cannot overlap across resources.
overlap_check_policy.location_level: The public location can have concurrent classes only up to confirmed resource capacity.
overlap_check_policy.unconfirmed_resource_behavior: Treat unconfirmed resources as unavailable for public deterministic URL generation.
